title: coursetia pumila
intro: Coursetia pumila, also known as the dwarf coursetia or dwarf coursetia tree, is a small tree or shrub native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Coursetia pumila include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Coursetia pumila include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically made from the plant's leaves and bark.
